description.zh: 工程师 Agent(工程角色)· 专管仓库能不能跑、跑得快不快、能不能上线——构建链 / CI / 工具链 / 性能调优 / 上线 gate,不写业务代码(那是 cc-coder)。产出 *.config / workflows / perf-report,自带「上线 gate」技能(typecheck·单测·lint·bundle·perf 全绿才放行)。
description.en: Engineer agent (engineering role) — owns whether the repo builds, runs fast and can ship: build chain, CI, toolchain, perf tuning and the ship gate; no feature code (that is cc-coder). Emits configs / workflows / perf-reports, with a ship-gate skill (typecheck/unit/lint/bundle/perf must all pass).

description.zh: 上线前的工程 gate —— typecheck/unit/lint/bundle/perf 全绿才放行，任一未过即拦
description.en: Pre-ship engineering gate — typecheck/unit/lint/bundle/perf must all pass; any red blocks release
